name: Sellistrix
location: Sellistrix the Lamia Queen in Arx Corinium, Glirion the Redbeard

bonuses.stat: When you deal damage you create an earthquake under the enemy that erupts after 1.5 seconds, dealing 975 Physical damage to all enemies within 4 meters and stunning them for 3 seconds. This effect can occur once every 6 seconds and the damage scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage.
